hero.text: Believe in the power of your dreams.
hero.author: Unknown

aries.general: A day for taking bold decisions; embrace your adventurous spirit.
aries.love: Passion ignites, but communication is key for harmony.
aries.career: A chance to take the lead on a new project; trust your instincts.

taurus.general: Stability is your focus today; nurture your roots.
taurus.love: Romantic moments are on the horizon; be open to vulnerability.
taurus.career: Financial planning and strategic moves will pay off.

gemini.general: Communication is your ally, making networking fruitful.
gemini.love: A lively conversation could spark a new connection.
gemini.career: Collaborative ideas will thrive; share your thoughts openly.

cancer.general: Emotional well-being is crucial; focus on self-care.
cancer.love: Deep conversations bring you closer to your partner.
cancer.career: Trust your intuition in decision-making for better outcomes.

leo.general: It's your time to shine; embrace your creativity.
leo.love: Spontaneity in love brings excitement; plan a surprise.
leo.career: A leadership role may be on the horizon; step up confidently.

virgo.general: Attention to detail pays off; stay organized.
virgo.love: Small gestures can strengthen your relationship.
virgo.career: Your analytical skills lead to innovations; trust your methods.

libra.general: Balance and harmony are essential; seek equilibrium in all.
libra.love: Partnerships flourish through compromise and understanding.
libra.career: Teamwork leads to significant achievements; collaborate.

scorpio.general: Intensity marks your day; embrace passion in all endeavors.
scorpio.career: Focus on your goals; determination will break barriers.

sagittarius.general: Adventure beckons; explore new horizons today.
sagittarius.love: A spontaneous outing could lead to unforgettable memories.
sagittarius.career: Innovative ideas may bring fresh opportunities; be brave.

capricorn.general: Structure and discipline will guide you to success.
capricorn.love: Show your commitment; shared goals strengthen bonds.
capricorn.career: Professional growth is on the horizon; pursue it diligently.

aquarius.general: Embrace change; new possibilities lie ahead.
aquarius.love: An open heart leads to deeper connections with loved ones.
aquarius.career: Your unique perspective will be valued; share your vision.

pisces.general: Creativity flows freely; express yourself artistically.
pisces.love: Intimacy deepens with emotional vulnerability; be genuine.
pisces.career: Your empathy can guide your colleagues; lead with heart.

professional.text: Success is not just about what you accomplish, but what you inspire others to do.
professional.author: Unknown

professional.text: Opportunities don't happen. You create them.
professional.author: Chris Grosser

professional.text: Don’t watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
professional.author: Sam Levenson

professional.text: The future depends on what you do today.
professional.author: Mahatma Gandhi

professional.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
professional.author: Henry David Thoreau

professional.text: I find that the harder I work, the more luck I seem to have.
professional.author: Thomas Jefferson

motivation.text: Push yourself, because no one else is going to do it for you.
motivation.author: Unknown

motivation.text: Great things never come from comfort zones.
motivation.author: Unknown

motivation.text: Dream it. Wish it. Do it.
motivation.author: Unknown

motivation.text: Success doesn’t just find you. You have to go out and get it.
motivation.author: Unknown

motivation.text: The harder you work for something, the greater you’ll feel when you achieve it.
motivation.author: Unknown

captions.text: Every day is a second chance.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Make today so awesome that yesterday gets jealous.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
captions.author: Theodore Roosevelt

captions.text: The best way to predict your future is to create it.
captions.author: Abraham Lincoln

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: The advance of technology is based on making it fit in so that you don’t even even notice it.
tech.author: Bill Gates

tech.text: We’re changing the world with technology.
tech.author: Bill Gates

tech.text: The great growling engine of change – technology.
tech.author: Alvin Toffler

tech.text: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
tech.author: Steve Jobs

tech.text: Technology is a useful servant but a dangerous master.
tech.author: Christian Lous Lange

fun.text: Why don’t scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I told my computer I needed a break, and now it won’t stop sending me Kit Kat ads.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: Parallel lines have so much in common. It’s a shame they’ll never meet.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: Why do we tell actors to 'break a leg?' Because every play has a cast.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I'm on a seafood diet. I see food and I eat it.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I would tell you a joke about an elevator, but it's an uplifting experience.
fun.author: Unknown

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don't see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: When you have faith, you leap into the unknown with confidence.
faith.author: Unknown

faith.text: Faith is not about everything turning out okay; it’s about being okay no matter how things turn out.
faith.author: Unknown

faith.text: The strongest faith is faith that is tested.
faith.author: Unknown

faith.text: Faith is the substance of things hoped for, the evidence of things not seen.
faith.author: Hebrews 11:1

faith.text: Your faith can move mountains, but don't be surprised if you find it under one.
faith.author: Unknown

wisdom.text: Wisdom is not a product of schooling but of the lifelong attempt to acquire it.
wisdom.author: Albert Einstein

wisdom.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: Do not dwell in the past, do not dream of the future, concentrate the mind on the present moment.
wisdom.author: Buddha

wisdom.text: In seeking wisdom, the journey is just as important as the destination.
wisdom.author: Unknown

wisdom.text: The wise man does not lay up his own treasures. The more he gives to others, the more he has for himself.
wisdom.author: Lao Tzu
